sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, start_time TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, end_time TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE);

INSERT INTO timestamps_table (start_time, end_time) VALUES (timestamp '2021-01-01 00:00:00+00', timestamp '2021-01-15 00:00:00+00'), (NULL, timestamp '2021-01-30 00:00:00+00'), (timestamp '2021-02-15 00:00:00+00', NULL);
SELECT id, timestampdiff_week(start_time, end_time) AS week_diff FROM timestamps_table WHERE start_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, timestampdiff_week(start_time, end_time) << 2 AS shifted_week_diff FROM timestamps_table WHERE end_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, timestampdiff_week(start_time, end_time) + (1 << 3) AS complex_diff FROM timestamps_table;
CREATE TABLE user_logs (user_id INT, log_time TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, activity VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO user_logs (user_id, log_time, activity) VALUES (1, timestamp '2021-02-01 12:00:00+00', 'login'), (2, timestamp '2021-02-10 12:00:00+00', 'logout');
SELECT ul.user_id, COUNT(*) AS activity_count, timestampdiff_week(MIN(ul.log_time), MAX(ul.log_time)) << 1 AS adjusted_interval FROM user_logs ul GROUP BY ul.user_id HAVING adjusted_interval >= 1;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_logs WHERE user_id = ul.user_id) << 1 AS user_activity_count, timestampdiff_week(MIN(ul.log_time), MAX(ul.log_time)) FROM user_logs ul GROUP BY ul.user_id;
SELECT id, (1 << 4) + timestampdiff_week(NULL, end_time) AS edge_case_test FROM timestamps_table;
SELECT *, timestampdiff_week(timestamp '2021-02-01 00:00:00', timestamp '2021-02-02 00:00:00') + (SELECT COUNT(*) << 1 FROM user_logs) as nested_combination FROM timestamps_table;
